methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
description: KTLO objectives for shared reliability and compliance work.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q2 Maintain platform integrity for rights, billing, and trust
companyObjectives.statement: Keep Spotify's shared platform reliable enough that monetization and content availability remain trustworthy.

objectives.title: 2026-Q2 Platform integrity KTLO goal
objectives.objective: Reduce operational risk across rights, billing, and policy enforcement.

keyResults.statement: Keep rights and payout exceptions within tolerance.

executingTeams.intent: Maintain rights accuracy and availability correctness.
